{{Infobox location
| name = Center for Arcane Research
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Center for Arcane Research]] is a smooth, rounded [[pyramid]] of glass and [[Lutoch Terelle]]'s destination.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Center for Arcane Research]] has three layers of magical wards.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Glass Ring Projector]] is assigned to the [[Center for Arcane Research]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
